fields.name: prompt
fields.description: A text description of the desired image(s). The maximum length is 32000 characters for the GPT image models, 1000 characters for `dall-e-2` and 4000 characters for `dall-e-3`.

fields.name: model
fields.description: The model to use for image generation. One of `dall-e-2`, `dall-e-3`, or a GPT image model (`gpt-image-1`, `gpt-image-1-mini`, `gpt-image-1.5`). Defaults to `dall-e-2` unless a parameter specific to the GPT image models is used.

fields.name: n
fields.description: The number of images to generate. Must be between 1 and 10. For `dall-e-3`, only `n=1` is supported.

fields.name: quality
fields.description:
The quality of the image that will be generated.

- `auto` (default value) will automatically select the best quality for the given model.
- `high`, `medium` and `low` are supported for the GPT image models.
- `hd` and `standard` are supported for `dall-e-3`.
- `standard` is the only option for `dall-e-2`.

fields.name: response_format
fields.description: The format in which generated images with `dall-e-2` and `dall-e-3` are returned. Must be one of `url` or `b64_json`. URLs are only valid for 60 minutes after the image has been generated. This parameter isn't supported for the GPT image models, which always return base64-encoded images.

fields.name: output_format
fields.description: The format in which the generated images are returned. This parameter is only supported for the GPT image models. Must be one of `png`, `jpeg`, or `webp`.

fields.name: output_compression
fields.description: The compression level (0-100%) for the generated images. This parameter is only supported for the GPT image models with the `webp` or `jpeg` output formats, and defaults to 100.

fields.name: stream
fields.description:
Generate the image in streaming mode. Defaults to `false`. See the
[Image generation guide](/docs/guides/image-generation) for more information.
This parameter is only supported for the GPT image models.

fields.name: size
fields.description: The size of the generated images. For `gpt-image-2` and `gpt-image-2-2026-04-21`, arbitrary resolutions are supported as `WIDTHxHEIGHT` strings, for example `1536x864`. Width and height must both be divisible by 16 and the requested aspect ratio must be between 1:3 and 3:1. Resolutions above `2560x1440` are experimental, and the maximum supported resolution is `3840x2160`. The requested size must also satisfy the model's current pixel and edge limits. The standard sizes `1024x1024`, `1536x1024`, and `1024x1536` are supported by the GPT image models; `auto` is supported for models that allow automatic sizing. For `dall-e-2`, use one of `256x256`, `512x512`, or `1024x1024`. For `dall-e-3`, use one of `1024x1024`, `1792x1024`, or `1024x1792`.

fields.name: moderation
fields.description: Control the content-moderation level for images generated by the GPT image models. Must be either `low` for less restrictive filtering or `auto` (default value).

fields.name: background
fields.description:
Allows to set transparency for the background of the generated image(s).
This parameter is only supported for the GPT image models. Must be one of
`transparent`, `opaque` or `auto` (default value). When `auto` is used, the
model will automatically determine the best background for the image.

If `transparent`, the output format needs to support transparency, so it
should be set to either `png` (default value) or `webp`.

fields.name: style
fields.description: The style of the generated images. This parameter is only supported for `dall-e-3`. Must be one of `vivid` or `natural`. Vivid causes the model to lean towards generating hyper-real and dramatic images. Natural causes the model to produce more natural, less hyper-real looking images.

fields.name: user
fields.description: A unique identifier representing your end-user, which can help OpenAI to monitor and detect abuse. [Learn more](/docs/guides/safety-best-practices#end-user-ids).

types.name: CreateImageRequestModel
types.description: The model to use for image generation. One of `dall-e-2`, `dall-e-3`, or a GPT image model (`gpt-image-1`, `gpt-image-1-mini`, `gpt-image-1.5`). Defaults to `dall-e-2` unless a parameter specific to the GPT image models is used.

types.name: CreateImageRequestQuality
types.description:
The quality of the image that will be generated.

- `auto` (default value) will automatically select the best quality for the given model.
- `high`, `medium` and `low` are supported for the GPT image models.
- `hd` and `standard` are supported for `dall-e-3`.
- `standard` is the only option for `dall-e-2`.

types.name: CreateImageRequestResponseFormat
types.description: The format in which generated images with `dall-e-2` and `dall-e-3` are returned. Must be one of `url` or `b64_json`. URLs are only valid for 60 minutes after the image has been generated. This parameter isn't supported for the GPT image models, which always return base64-encoded images.

types.name: CreateImageRequestOutputFormat
types.description: The format in which the generated images are returned. This parameter is only supported for the GPT image models. Must be one of `png`, `jpeg`, or `webp`.

types.name: CreateImageRequestSize
types.description: The size of the generated images. For `gpt-image-2` and `gpt-image-2-2026-04-21`, arbitrary resolutions are supported as `WIDTHxHEIGHT` strings, for example `1536x864`. Width and height must both be divisible by 16 and the requested aspect ratio must be between 1:3 and 3:1. Resolutions above `2560x1440` are experimental, and the maximum supported resolution is `3840x2160`. The requested size must also satisfy the model's current pixel and edge limits. The standard sizes `1024x1024`, `1536x1024`, and `1024x1536` are supported by the GPT image models; `auto` is supported for models that allow automatic sizing. For `dall-e-2`, use one of `256x256`, `512x512`, or `1024x1024`. For `dall-e-3`, use one of `1024x1024`, `1792x1024`, or `1024x1792`.

types.name: CreateImageRequestModeration
types.description: Control the content-moderation level for images generated by the GPT image models. Must be either `low` for less restrictive filtering or `auto` (default value).

types.name: CreateImageRequestBackground
types.description:
Allows to set transparency for the background of the generated image(s).
This parameter is only supported for the GPT image models. Must be one of
`transparent`, `opaque` or `auto` (default value). When `auto` is used, the
model will automatically determine the best background for the image.

If `transparent`, the output format needs to support transparency, so it
should be set to either `png` (default value) or `webp`.

types.name: CreateImageRequestStyle
types.description: The style of the generated images. This parameter is only supported for `dall-e-3`. Must be one of `vivid` or `natural`. Vivid causes the model to lean towards generating hyper-real and dramatic images. Natural causes the model to produce more natural, less hyper-real looking images.

types.name: ImagesResponse

fields.name: created
fields.description: The Unix timestamp (in seconds) of when the image was created.

fields.name: data
fields.description: The list of generated images.

fields.name: background
fields.description: The background parameter used for the image generation. Either `transparent` or `opaque`.

fields.name: output_format
fields.description: The output format of the image generation. Either `png`, `webp`, or `jpeg`.

fields.name: size
fields.description: The size of the image generated. Either `1024x1024`, `1024x1536`, or `1536x1024`.

fields.name: quality
fields.description: The quality of the image generated. Either `low`, `medium`, or `high`.

types.description: The response from the image generation endpoint.

types.name: Image

fields.name: b64_json
fields.description: The base64-encoded JSON of the generated image. Returned by default for the GPT image models, and only present if `response_format` is set to `b64_json` for `dall-e-2` and `dall-e-3`.

fields.name: url
fields.description: When using `dall-e-2` or `dall-e-3`, the URL of the generated image if `response_format` is set to `url` (default value). Unsupported for the GPT image models.

fields.name: revised_prompt
fields.description: For `dall-e-3` only, the revised prompt that was used to generate the image.

types.description: Represents the content or the URL of an image generated by the OpenAI API.

types.name: ImagesResponseBackground
types.description: The background parameter used for the image generation. Either `transparent` or `opaque`.

types.name: ImagesResponseOutputFormat
types.description: The output format of the image generation. Either `png`, `webp`, or `jpeg`.

types.name: ImagesResponseSize
types.description: The size of the image generated. Either `1024x1024`, `1024x1536`, or `1536x1024`.

types.name: ImagesResponseQuality
types.description: The quality of the image generated. Either `low`, `medium`, or `high`.

types.name: ImageGenUsage

fields.name: input_tokens
fields.description: The number of tokens (images and text) in the input prompt.

fields.name: total_tokens
fields.description: The total number of tokens (images and text) used for the image generation.

fields.name: output_tokens
fields.description: The number of output tokens generated by the model.

types.description: For `gpt-image-1` only, the token usage information for the image generation.

types.name: ImageGenOutputTokensDetails

fields.name: image_tokens
fields.description: The number of image output tokens generated by the model.

fields.name: text_tokens
fields.description: The number of text output tokens generated by the model.

types.description: The output token details for the image generation.

types.name: ImageGenInputUsageDetails

fields.name: text_tokens
fields.description: The number of text tokens in the input prompt.

fields.name: image_tokens
fields.description: The number of image tokens in the input prompt.

types.description: The input tokens detailed information for the image generation.

methods.description: Creates an image given a prompt. [Learn more](/docs/guides/images).
